message:
chore(config): add MCP server config templates for various coding tools

These files serve as reference templates showing how to configure various
coding tools to connect to the MCP Agent Mail server. All use placeholder
values (YOUR_BEARER_TOKEN, YOUR_PROJECT, YOUR_AGENT_NAME) that users should
replace with their actual values or let the integration scripts populate.

New files:
- cline.mcp.json: Cline IDE MCP server configuration
- windsurf.mcp.json: Windsurf IDE MCP server configuration

Updated files:
- codex.mcp.json: Cleaned up formatting, placeholder token
- cursor.mcp.json: Cleaned up formatting, placeholder token
- gemini.mcp.json: Cleaned up formatting, placeholder token
- .claude/settings.json: Full template with hooks configuration
  - SessionStart: file reservations + pending acks
  - PreToolUse (Edit): expiring reservation warnings
  - PostToolUse (Bash): inbox reminder hook
  - PostToolUse (send_message): ack request list
  - PostToolUse (file_reservation_paths): reservation list

Updated .gitignore:
- Added exception to track .claude/settings.json as a template
- Other .claude/* files remain ignored (machine-specific hooks, etc.)

Note: The integration scripts (integrate_claude_code.sh, etc.) will
populate these templates with actual values when run.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -224,7 +224,9 @@ signing-*.key
 signing-*.pub
 
 # Local agent configuration directories (per-user, not project config)
+# Exception: We track settings.json templates as examples for this project
 .claude/
+!.claude/settings.json
 .codex/
 .cursor/
 .gemini/
